answer: Hi! I'm Mohd Faizan, a Full Stack Developer and Machine Learning enthusiast currently pursuing my MCA at Integral University in Lucknow. I specialize in MERN Stack, Python, and Data Science.

I have expertise in both Frontend and Backend development. My core skills include React, JavaScript, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, MongoDB, and SQL. I also work with AI/ML technologies like Pandas, Scikit-Learn, and RAG systems.

I've built several exciting projects! Some highlights include a Netflix Clone with an ML recommendation engine, a Full Stack donation platform (The Power of One), an AI-powered Email Classification System, and a Gym Management System in C++.
I am currently pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Applications (MCA) at Integral University in Lucknow, where I have achieved an outstanding CGPA of 9.5.
You can reach me via email at umohdfaizan@gmail.com, or call me at +91 8810743304. I'm always open to new opportunities!
I completed an Analytics Virtual Internship at Forage (Deloitte), and have undergone comprehensive Data Science training from Oracle, Internshala, and IBM.
I offer Full Stack Web Development, AI & LLM integration, Data Analysis, and Custom Software Solutions. If you have an idea, let's build it!
